landing.title: Patient portal
landing.body: Sign in using your clinic link, e.g. app.example.com/clinic-name/patient, or with your CPF on that same clinic page. If your link has no clinic segment in the URL, ask the front desk for the full address or a new invite.

enter.error: Invalid or expired link. Ask your clinic for a new one.

login.title: Sign in with CPF
login.subtitle: Enter the CPF on file with your clinic. We'll send a code to your email and, when configured, WhatsApp.
login.codeSent: If this CPF is registered, you'll receive a code shortly. Check email and messages.
login.requestFailed: Could not send the code. Try again.
login.haveLink: I already have my clinic link

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: Records of your care journey at the clinic.
timeline.capped: Partial list — more events may exist in history.
timeline.portalFileSubmitted: You uploaded a document (under clinic review)
timeline.portalFileRejected: Document not accepted by the clinic

home.accessSubtitle: Follow your stages, documents, and updates from your clinic in one place. Access works with the invite you received or with the CPF on file.
home.accessStepsHint: You can use either option below.
home.accessStepLink: Open the link your clinic sent (email, WhatsApp, or SMS). The address should include the clinic name in the path.
home.accessStepCpf: Or tap “Sign in with CPF”, enter the ID on file with your clinic, and use the code we send to your email and, when enabled, WhatsApp.
home.noJourney: There is no active care journey right now. Your clinic will guide next steps.
home.journeyDescription: Your treatment stages and progress on the pathway your clinic has set up.
home.loadError: Could not load your data. Try signing out and opening the link again.
home.readOnlyJourneyHint: Stages, checklist, and journey changes are managed by your clinic team. You can follow progress here; only your personal details can be edited by you.

files.title: Documents
files.description: Clinic files and your uploads. New uploads are reviewed before download is enabled.
files.statusPending: Under clinic review — download after approval
